input_text: Anna handed Mark a silver key. The student carrying the books greeted the teacher. Daniel went back to the bathroom. The street is in Tallinn. The horse kept in the stable was calm. The letter was written. A village road was narrow. John is a nice man. Mary visited London in September. Clinton defeated Dole. Sandra travelled to the kitchen. If X is cool then X is red. Earth contains Europe. John has an apple. The chef cooked a meal for the guests. Jessica is a mouse. Eve failed to finish the report. The bike is small. Mike is a nice man. Tom refused to eat the soup. The dog was barking and the cat was too. Sue is a true patriot. Elephants are big. Greg is a bad man. If X1 is male and X1 is a grandchild of Y1, X1 is a grandson of Y1. The cup filled with water fell. Amazon's length is 20 kilometers. Mr Dursley is a Muggle. The picture was painted by Leo. Winona is a sheep. The window was broken. Mike has a pear. Unexpectedly, the door opened. Catholics can not disappear. The children playing in the garden laughed. Riga is not in Estonia. The stone was heavy. Which nice man has an apple and a pear?
